source: independent (non-author) pred-scout-coach-critic reviewing data/postgame/*.json coaching against the match facts; preference-based / ungrounded lines flagged; grounded rewrites applied back

0a84cd68-fd4f-4f26-98bc-994f2259fb43.quote: Wraith had the favored lane but your damage (4/5 of the team) was magical into a comp where one magic-resist item blunts most of it — that's the comp flag, and it showed. Your Vanquisher didn't come online until 36 min; you were under-tuned for the fights that mattered (14, 18.5, 23). Push for objectives you can actually take, not 5v2s into Legion.
0a84cd68-fd4f-4f26-98bc-994f2259fb43.issue: invents a 5v2 the macro contradicts (all engages were 5v5)
0a84cd68-fd4f-4f26-98bc-994f2259fb43.rewrite: Wraith had the favored lane but your damage (4/5 of the team) was magical into a comp where one magic-resist item blunts most of it — that's the comp flag, and it showed. Your Vanquisher didn't come online until 36 min; you were under-tuned for the fights that mattered (14, 18.5, 23). Push for objectives you can actually take instead of walking the full team into Legion's side, where these 5v5s kept going his way.

c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.quote: Legion carry (1/4) into a slightly favored Murdock (53%) — never got going in a 17-minute game; nothing to scale into.
c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.issue: matchup is unfavored, not favored — inverts the draft read
c574a71e-39f1-4e74-9071-f7b4a9125761.rewrite: Legion carry (1/4) into an unfavored Murdock (52.7%) — never got going in a 17-minute game; nothing to scale into.

e5ef8df1-4099-43f3-9e6a-01a19ea6c75e.quote: Four favored lanes and a fed Sparrow carried it, but you let a 35-minute game stay close on bad trades.
e5ef8df1-4099-43f3-9e6a-01a19ea6c75e.issue: only three lanes were favored, not four
e5ef8df1-4099-43f3-9e6a-01a19ea6c75e.rewrite: Three favored lanes (carry, offlane, jungle) and a fed Sparrow carried it, but you let a 35-minute game stay close on bad trades.

ee1d457d-940b-4fa0-adb7-a3204e596ff1.quote: This is the trio working: out-towered them 9–5 and converted the objective lead. Willy's Steel set the table (18 assists) and Xeebs' Serath carried the jungle. Cuban's Feng Mao did 25% less damage than his norm, but the map control covered it. Repeat this — control neutrals, convert to towers.
ee1d457d-940b-4fa0-adb7-a3204e596ff1.rewrite: This is the trio working: out-towered them 9–5 and converted the objective lead. Willy's Steel set the table (13 assists) and Xeebs' Serath carried the jungle. Cuban's Feng Mao did 25% less damage than his norm, but the map control covered it. Repeat this — control neutrals, convert to towers.

ee1d457d-940b-4fa0-adb7-a3204e596ff1.quote: Steel support, 18 assists, 9–5 towers — elite enabling and you called the map. Five deaths is a touch high for a frontline tank.
ee1d457d-940b-4fa0-adb7-a3204e596ff1.rewrite: Steel support, 13 assists, 9–5 towers — elite enabling and you called the map. Five deaths is a touch high for a frontline tank.
